title: Binding tape, binding method, tape winding body and reel
abstract: A binding tape (10) includes an intermediate layer (11), and a first surface layer (16) covering one surface of the intermediate layer (11). The intermediate layer (11) has a plurality of first linear members (12) arranged side by side at an angle with respect to a longitudinal direction (D1) of the binding tape (10).
claims: 1. A tape winding body including a binding tape to be wound around a to-be-bound object and configured to bind the to-be-bound object by connecting overlapped portions of the binding tape by a staple, the tape winding body comprising: a tube member formed to have a hollow cylindrical shape whose center is a central axis and having an inner wall surface, an outer peripheral surface on which the binding tape is wound and one end face connecting the inner wall surface and the outer peripheral surface and facing toward a direction of the central axis; and a film provided to face the end face and formed with a hole communicating with a region surrounded by the inner wall surface, wherein the film is flexible to be elastically deformable, and an end edge of the film defining the hole is a free end which protrudes from the end face towards the central axis, wherein a region of the film between the inner wall surface of the tube member and the free end of the film does not contact the tube member.
